title: LICHEN_LORA_FRAME_OVERHEAD constant is manually calculated and may drift
description:
Location: lora_l2.h:56

**What goes wrong:** The comment says overhead is "10 + 48 - margin rounded" = 55 bytes, but doesn't reference the actual link layer constants. If schnorr48.h or frame.c change signature or frame format sizes, this constant silently drifts, causing silent truncation or oversized frames.

**Impact:** New contributors will update one constant but not the other. The MTU mismatch BUILD_ASSERT in lichen_l2.c catches L2_MTU vs LORA_MTU drift, but not the FRAME_OVERHEAD derivation going stale.

**Fix:** Either derive LICHEN_LORA_FRAME_OVERHEAD from the actual constants (lichen_link_frame_overhead() or equivalent compile-time macro), or add a BUILD_ASSERT that validates the overhead against actual frame format sizes.
